arrival.text: Scan your QR Code at the box with the red flashing lights. Hold the QR code about 2 inches away from the reader and the gate will open.
You may park in any available space.
Once parked, please wait for the shuttle by upper or lower entrance.

departure.text: Once you have retrieved your luggage, please call (718) 512-0248 to request the shuttle or use the this link (https://trackmyshuttle.com/a/1140).
Upon returning back to the hotel, please scan your QR code to exit the facility.

common.title: Aloft LGA - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 100-15 Ditmars Blvd. This is the Aloft & Ibis Hotel Airport Parking Lot, operated by Parking Systems. It is located on the north side of Ditmars Blvd. between 102nd St. and 94th St. You can only access this location traveling west on Ditmars Blvd.
restrictions:
Complimentary Shuttle Service: Monday-Sunday | 4:30 AM – Midnight. 
SHUTTLE PICK-UP LOCATIONS: ARRIVALS TERMINALS ONLY
Terminal A – From your respective airlines.
Terminal B – Gate 4.
Terminal C – From your respective airlines.
Terminal D – From your respective airlines.

Please call (718) 512-0248 to request the shuttle once you have retrieved your luggage.

Estimated oversize fee of $5 daily for vehicles between 65” and 75” in height and over 180” in length, or any vehicle taller than 75”. These fees are to be paid directly to the facility upon exit if you did not include them with your reservation.
The shuttle runs every 30 minutes on the hour and on the half hour.

items.full_description: The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.

arrival.text: Upon arrival, outdoor signs will direct you where to stop your vehicle. Please stay in your vehicle and an attendant will come out to assist with check-in.
Once you arrive, follow signs labeled Airport Parking. Check-in with the Valet staff and present your SpotHero parking pass. The staff will park your vehicle and direct you to the shuttle.

You'll receive a claim check for your vehicle and please make sure to leave your keys. A complimentary shuttle service to LGA is available from this location 24/7. The shuttle leaves on-demand to ensure fast availability. Please call 888-960-7275.

departure.text: Upon arrival back at the airport, please call 888-960-7275 to request a return shuttle to the lot. Additional shuttle pick-up instructions are provided onsite during vehicle drop-off. Present your claim check to the valet and your vehicle will be retrieved.
You're free to go!

common.title: Purchase Park 2 Fly LGA - Uncovered Valet
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 2261 94th St. This Uncovered Valet is operated by Purchase Park 2 Fly. It is located on the corner of side of 94th St. between 23rd St. and 95th St.
restrictions: Height restriction: 5' 9"
NO EXTENSIONS VIA APP- Any extensions must be paid directly on-site to the operator.
No Large SUV's.

This is the entrance address for the New York LaGuardia LGA - Uncovered Valet lot, operated by Parking Place LGA. It is located on the South/Right-hand side of Ditmars Blvd. (a one-way street) between 90th St. and 92nd St.
restrictions:
Oversized Vehicle Charges: The following fees are payable on-site during check-in:

•Small/Midsize SUV: $6/day

•Large SUV, Minivans, Vans, Trucks: $10/day
Free Amenities: Restrooms, customer lounge, phone charging stations, drinking water.
Security: Fenced perimeter, floodlights, CCTV surveillance, and on-site staff.

You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Show validation to the front desk after parking. The shuttle runs 24/7, every 15 minutes.

departure.text: Upon your return, please call the hotel at (718) 565-8900 to request the shuttle. After contacting the hotel, gather your belongings and proceed to the designated shuttle pick‑up area for transportation back to the facility. The shuttle arrives approximately every 15 minutes. Please be prepared to show proof of parking purchase.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

restrictions: Standard sized vehicles only. Due to size constraints, this location is unable to accommodate minivans, midsize and large SUVs, pickup trucks, and passenger vans.

arrival.text: Please visit the LaGuardia Plaza Hotel lobby once you have arrived. You must check in with the front desk before parking. Show the front desk associate your SpotHero parking pass. The front desk associate will hand you a ticket and direct you where to park your vehicle. Place the ticket in your dashboard.
Pull a ticket to enter the parking area. You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved."
Gather your luggage and head over to the LGA shuttle. The shuttle is located outside their sister Hotel Lobby, Hampton Inn.

departure.text: After arriving back, retrieve luggage and contact hotel (718) 672 6600, Option 1, to schedule shuttle service back to hotel!
Once you've returned, please proceed to either of the Hotel's lobby with your parking ticket so that the front desk can validate it. Once validated leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: DoubleTree by Hilton New York LaGuardia Airport - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 102-40 Ditmars Blvd. This is the entrance address for the Double Tree by Hilton New York LaGuardia Airport lot. It is located on the south side of Ditmars Blvd and 104th St.The entrance is between LaGuardia Plaza Hotel and Hampton Inn New York. Please reference the photos.
restrictions: Hampton Inn is right next to the LaGuardia Plaza; just Northwest of the hotel.
Height restriction: 6' 1"
Please note: customers must wait for the airport shuttle in their sister hotel, Hampton Inn.

Upon arriving, please pull your vehicle into the roundabout and proceed into the lobby to check in with the front desk. You must check in with the front desk before parking. You will then be directed on where to park.

arrival.text: Prior to parking, you will need to call 917-765-5171 and provide your SpotHero Rental ID, Name, Phone Number, Email Address, and Flight Details or email the information to lga@parkforu.com

When you arrive to park, a valet service agent will drive you in your vehicle to the Terminal, assist with luggage, and then park the car for you at one of the operator's secured lots.Please be advised to take a picture of your vehicle for your record.

departure.text: Upon your return to LGA, after retrieving your luggage, call 917-765-5171 to request pick up. A valet service agent will pick you up directly from the Arrival Terminal, help with your luggage and drive back to the office lot to retrieve your vehicle.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

restrictions: An additional fee will apply for SUVs and oversized vehicles, to be paid on-site at check-in.

PLEASE NOTE: A 3-day minimum reservation is required for the complimentary shuttle to LGA.
PLEASE NOTE: Shuttle service is limited to a maximum of 4 persons per party.

common.title: Four Points by Sheraton Farrington Garage - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 33-66 Farrington St. This is the Four Points by Sheraton Farrington Garage, operated by Propark. It is located on the west side of Farrington St. between 35th Ave. and 33rd Ave.
restrictions: Customers must enter after the reservation start time and leave before the reservation exit time to avoid additional on-site charges.
Estimated oversize fee of $5 daily for vehicles between 65” and 75” in height and over 180” in length, or any vehicle taller than 75”.

If you are parking a large van, truck, or SUV, there will be an additional oversize fee charged at the facility directly. This will be an additional $15/day if you paid a standard oversize fee with your SpotHero reservation, or $25/day if you did not.
If you need to stay longer than your reservation period, the reservation cannot be extended and you will be required to pay the regular rate for any additional hours or days.
If you overstay your reservation, you will be charged the board rates for the additional time. We are not responsible for cancelled or delayed flights.
In the event of mechanical emergencies with the shuttle or delays due to traffic, the lot does not reimburse cost of alternate transportation.
Online reservations are not eligible for hotel guests.
The Airport Shuttle runs every 30 minutes between 4am - 8am. Then from 8am - 12am, the Airport Shuttle runs every hour.

departure.text: When you arrive at the airport, gather your belongings and visit TrackMyShuttle.com and enter tracking ID 3368 for shuttle info.
Once you arrive at the hotel, present the Valet with your ticket to retrieve your vehicle.
When you return to your vehicle you are free to go!

common.title: Hotel Indigo Flushing - Covered Valet
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 36-03 Prince St, Queens, NY 11354. This is the Hotel Indigo Flushing LGA Garage, operated by Propark. It is located on the NE side of Prince St. between 36th Rd. and 36th Ave.
restrictions: Customers must enter after the reservation start time and leave before the reservation exit time to avoid additional on-site charges.
Height restriction: 6' 10"

If you are parking a large SUV, there will be an additional oversize fee charged at the facility directly. This will be an additional $5/day if you paid a standard oversize fee with your SpotHero reservation, or $10/day if you did not.
If you overstay your reservation, you will be charged the board rates for the additional time. We are not responsible for cancelled or delayed flights.
In the event of mechanical emergencies with the shuttle or delays due to traffic, the lot does not reimburse cost of alternate transportation.
Reservation extensions are not allowed. Customers overstaying their booking will be charged the difference on site.

SHUTTLE HOURS and FREQUENCY:

4am-12pm every 30 Minutes

12pm-11pm - every 1 Hour

departure.text: Upon your return, proceed to your terminal’s designated shuttle pick-up area, then call the hotel at (718) 898-9868 say “shuttle” to request the shuttle. Shuttle service is available from 4am-1am daily.
